display_information.name: Alt-Text Assistant
display_information.description: Ensures all images meet accessibility standards.
display_information.long_description:
Alt-Text Assistant is an intelligent accessibility assistant designed to ensure your workspace remains inclusive and compliant with digital accessibility standards. By leveraging advanced AI, this app seamlessly evaluates images shared across your Slack channels to ensure they include accurate, descriptive alt-text.

Key Features:
• Automated Auditing: Passively monitors designated channels for image uploads and cross-references their existing alt-text against your company's specific accessibility guidelines.
• Smart Suggestions: If an image is missing alt-text or has a poor description, the app instantly provides a high-quality, copy-pasteable suggestion to help the user fix it.
• On-Demand Thread Audits: Tag the bot in a thread containing an older image, and it will intelligently search the thread history to audit the specific image you need help with.
• Private Conversational Help: Send a Direct Message to the app to get 1-on-1 assistance with drafting alt-text before you post your images publicly.

Whether your team is actively maintaining an accessibility-first workflow or just needs a quick description for a complex chart, Alt-Text Assistant integrates directly into your daily communications. It actively educates users and promotes an inclusive digital environment without disrupting productivity.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Hi, I am an agent built using Bolt for JavaScript. I am here to help you out!
